recommendations.title: The Land Before Time XI: Invasion of the Tinysauruses
recommendations.overview: Littlefoot and his friends return in another adventure. But this time, they aren't the smallest dinosaurs in the valley anymore.

recommendations.title: The Land Before Time VI: The Secret of Saurus Rock
recommendations.overview: Legends claim that Saurus Rock keeps bad luck out of the Great Valley. Is it really true? Could the mysterious Longneck named Doc be the famous Lone Dinosaur, who can defeat a Sharptooth with his lasso-like tail To find out, Littlefoot and company mu

recommendations.title: The Land Before Time XII: The Great Day of the Flyers
recommendations.overview: As the Great Day of the Flyers nears, the Great Valley's flying youngsters are eager to participate in the annual exhibition to show off their skills. Everyone, that is, except free-spirited pterodactyl Petrie, whose individualism causes problems whe

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Forest
recommendations.overview: A young mouse, mole and hedgehog risk their lives to find a cure for their badger friend, who's been poisoned by men.

recommendations.title: The Land Before Time V: The Mysterious Island
recommendations.overview: Littlefoot and his friends the gang in their next when a swarm of leaf gobblers had destroyed their homes and this forces them to find a new home but yet find an mysterious island.

recommendations.title: The Land Before Time X: The Great Longneck Migration
recommendations.overview: A bedtime story leads Littlefoot and his grandparents on a journey to a new land, where Littlefoot discovers someone who vanished before he was born: his father! Now Littlefoot must decide between two worlds. Will he leave to be with his friends in t

recommendations.title: The Land Before Time IX: Journey to Big Water
recommendations.overview: Littlefoot befriends with a mysterious, fun-loving dolphin-like creature named Mo, who is trapped in "new water" caused by heavy rain. The gang then goes on an adventure to the "big water" to bring Mo home.

recommendations.title: The Land Before Time XIII: The Wisdom of Friends
recommendations.overview: Littlefoot learns a series of important lessons following an incident that nearly costs his grandmother her life. Soon afterwards, three dinosaurs arrive claiming they have lost their way.

recommendations.title: The Land Before Time VII: The Stone of Cold Fire

recommendations.title: Dinosaur
recommendations.overview: An orphaned dinosaur raised by lemurs joins an arduous trek to a sancturary after a meteorite shower destroys his family home.
